_comment: Sources for scripts/build-plugin-index.mjs. Add GitHub repos as 'owner/repo' under "repos", or whole users/orgs under "users" (every public repo is scanned). "repoDirs" is seeded from the existing catalog (repoDir = owner-repo joined by '-'; the script resolves the split via the GitHub API). Only MIT/Unlicense repos are included; plugins containing @no-localize are skipped.
